data.title: Valmont Appoints John Schwietz as Chief Financial Officer and Reiterates Full-Year 2026 Financial Guidance
data.description: Valmont® Industries, Inc. (NYSE: VMI) based in Omaha, Nebraska has appointed John L. Schwietz as its new Chief Financial Officer. Valmont is a global leader offering products and solutions for infrastructure and agricultural productivity. John's appointment as CFO was announced by Avner Applbaum, Valmont's CEO, who expressed confidence in his leadership abilities and extensive experience within the company's business segments. This strategic move aims to further strengthen the financial management of Valmont, benefiting from John's successful track record in finance.

data.title: CamundaCon 2026 Brings the Global Orchestration Community Together to Break Through the Automation Ceiling
data.description: Camunda, the leading enterprise platform specializing in agentic orchestration, is set to hold its CamundaCon 2026 conference at the iconic Beurs van Berlage in Amsterdam from May 19 to 21, 2026. Titled The Agentic Orchestration Conference, this three-day event marks the largest CamundaCon to date, bringing together a worldwide community of over **leaders, enterprise architects, developers, and operations executives. The goal is to explore strategies for overcoming the automation barrier, a key hurdle in enterprise transformation. This conference represents a significant opportunity for industry professionals to collaborate and innovate in tackling this pressing challenge.

data.title: Entrée Resources updates JV licenses, shares drill & regional exploration findings.
data.description: The latest report indicates that the unemployment rate has risen to 5.2%, reflecting an increase of 0.3% from the previous month. This change means that a total of 150,000 more people are now unemployed. In addition, the report shows that the economy added 50,000 new jobs, but this was not enough to offset the higher number of unemployed individuals. This data suggests a more challenging job market for job-seekers in the coming months.

data.title: EDGX launches first in-orbit demonstration of its AI computing system on SpaceX Transporter-16
data.description: Belgium-based space technology company, EDGX, recently achieved a significant milestone with the successful launch of STERNA, an AI-powered edge computer designed for satellites. This cutting-edge technology offers space-grade reliability and is intended for use in satellite constellations. The launch took place in orbit on April 9, 2026. STERNA represents EDGX's foray into advancing satellite technology with its innovative approach, highlighting the company's commitment to establishing a presence in the space sector.

data.title: Why Are Applied Digital Shares Sliding Thursday?
data.description: Shares of Applied Digital Corp (NASDAQ: APLD) are in the spotlight as the company released its third-quarter financial results after market close on Wednesday. Despite beating analyst expectations, the stock experienced downward pressure during early premarket trading. Nasdaq futures declined by 0.26% and S&P 500 futures dropped by 0.32%. Applied Digital reported third-quarter revenue of $126.6 million, significantly surpassing the estimated $76.56 million, marking a 139% year-over-year increase. The company also posted adjusted earnings of nine cents per share, exceeding the anticipated loss of 10 cents per share. The growth in the HPC hosting business was a key driver of these positive results.

data.title: Cartography Biosciences Advances Strategic Oncology Collaboration with Gilead’s First Option Target Exercise
data.description: In South San Francisco, a clinical-stage biotechnology company, Cartography Biosciences, Inc., revealed that Gilead Sciences, Inc. has opted to exclusively license a newly discovered oncology target developed through Cartography's ATLAS and SUMMIT platforms. This collaboration has reached a significant milestone with Gilead exercising the first of its licensing options. This move signifies a pivotal development in the partnership, highlighting the value of the innovative antibody-based cancer therapies being developed.

data.title: Chevron Confirms Oil Discovery at Bandit Prospect in Gulf of America
data.description: An oil discovery at the Bandit prospect in the Gulf of America has been confirmed by Chevron Corporation (NYSE:CVX), according to operator Occidental. The exploration well is situated in Green Canyon Block 680, approximately 125 miles south of the Louisiana coast. The well has found high-quality, full-to-base oil-bearing Miocene sands. Co-owners are assessing the results to plan next steps. The discovery has potential for subsea tie-backs to an adjacent Occidental operation.

data.title: Capstone Green Energy Powers Premier Utah Hospitality Destination
data.description: In Los Angeles, Capstone Green Energy Holdings, Inc. (OTCQX: CGEH) recently secured an order. The company, known for its clean microturbine energy solutions, will provide two Capstone C800 Signature Series microturbines for a Utah-based premier golf and hospitality resort. These solutions are tailored for industrial and commercial operations, including emerging datacenter applications. This agreement marks a significant step for Capstone in the sustainable energy sector.

data.title: Metro Health Care Costs Vary by More than Twofold Nationwide
data.description: A recent report from the HCCI Health Cost Landscape reveals that disparities in health care spending across US metro areas are primarily driven by prices rather than the utilization of services. The data, released on April 9, 2026, highlights the significant differences in costs, with prices varying by over 100% between different locations. This underscores the impact of pricing structures on overall healthcare expenditure nationwide.
